title: Glemtastrophe: Anatomy of a Glemsaster
description: The true story about the town of Wet Finger, Nevada and its water supply, tainted by alcohol runoff from Las Vegas. Glem Blorchman, an un-disbarred attorney, takes the case.
quote: Once I win, I’ll be like Dracula. Dead and loving it! Except I’ll be alive.
altHero: Glem Blorchman illuminated by the light through window blinds
alt3: Glem Blorchman being dragged away by a mob on the hood of his car
alt4: Glem in the courtroom, sweaty and with his pants at his ankles
